Attack
1 hit x 100% damage
Points in Magic and Fighting give this attack a chance to do extra damage.
Every 50 CHA the Hero has reduces the dragon's CD of all skills by 1 (max -4 at 200 CHA)
Requirements: None
Effect: Breathes fire at target for 1 hit of 100% Magic damage.
• If  Kid Dragon has 1 Magic skill point minimum: Has a [Magic skill level / 4]% chance to cast a ball of magic at target for 1 hit of [100 + (Magic skill level / 5)]% Magic damage.
• If  Kid Dragon has 1 Fighting skill point minimum: Has a [Fighting skill level / 4]% chance to dash at target quickly for 1 hit of [100 + (Fighting skill level / 5)]% Melee damage.
Mana Cost: 0
Cooldown: 0
Damage Type: Magic/Melee
Element: As dragon
Dragon's Scales
Hero: +<100-200> Avoidance for 2 turns.
This skill requires at least 100 points in Protection.
Requirements:  Toddler or  Kid Dragon; 100 Protection skill points minimum
Effect: Applies +[Protection skill level] Melee/Pierce/Magic Avoidance to player for 2 turns. (Pop-up: Avoidance increased!)
Cooldown: 19 - [(Player CHA/50), rounded down]
Damage Type: N/A
Element: N/A
Elemental Supernova
1 hit x +<200-300>% Magic damage
This attack has +<100-200> Crit.
This skill requires at least 100 points in Magic.
Requirements:  Toddler or  Kid Dragon; 100 Magic skill points minimum
Effect: 1 hit of [100 + (Magic skill level)]% damage, with +[Magic skill level] Crit.
Damage Type: Magic
Element: Weakness seeks
Appearance 1 /  1.1
Outrage
4 hits x <50-60>% Pierce damage (<200-240>%)
Target: (On hit) <x>-<y>DoT for 3 turns.
This skill requires at least 100 points in Fighting.
Requirements:  Toddler or  Kid Dragon; 100 Fighting skill points minimum
Effect: 4 hits of [40 + (Fighting skill level / 10)]% damage, amounting to [160 + (Fighting skill level / 2.5)]% damage; applies 'Outrage', a Pierce DoT effect equal to [10 + (Fighting skill level / 2) * (Level + 10)% � 5], to target for 3 turns.
Damage Type: Pierce
Overcharge
Hero: +<15-25> Boost for the next 2 turns.
This skill requires at least 100 points in Assistance.
Requirements:  Toddler or  Kid Dragon; 100 Assistance skill points minimum
Effect: Applies +[5 + (Assistance skill level / 10)]% Boost to player for 2 turns. (Pop-up: Damage increased!)
Tickles
Target: (Auto) -<10-20> Boost, -<25-50> Crit, -<5-10> All res, +<20-30> Health res for 3 turns.
This skill requires at least 100 points in Mischief.
Requirements:  Toddler or  Kid Dragon; 100 Mischief skill points minimum
Effect: Applies -[Mischief skill level / 4] Crit, -[Mischief skill level * 0.1]% Boost, -[Mischief skill level * 0.05] All Resist, and +[10 + (Mischief skill level * 0.1)] Health Resist to target for 3 turns. (Pop-up: Your foe deals and heals less damage, takes more damage, and is less likely to land a critical hit!)
Primal Fury!
3 hits x 50% Magic damage (150%)
This attack has +200 Crit.
The cutest primal fury ever!
Requirements:  Kid Dragon
Effect: 3 hits of 50% damage, amounting to 150% damage, with +200 Crit.
Appearance 1 /  1.1 /  1.2
• Draco is this guest's default name; to change their name and/or color palette from the default, visit  Dragon Customization.
• Also known as the Destroyer from various NPCs.
• Toddler and kid dragons cannot be summoned as a guest while inside of a quest; however, they may still be summoned as a pet.
• Kid dragons may be equipped with  Kid Dragon Accessories; if the player's dragon's appearance is Baby or Toddler Dragon, the accessories will not be shown.
• Kid dragons may change their appearance as  Baby or Toddler Dragon via  Dove in  Sunbreeze Grove (Books 3 and 4), but all skills are retained; this was implemented on  June 19th, 2026.
• All versions of this guest received a major overhaul to their skills on  June 21st, 2019.
• Initially both toddler and kid dragons were able to use the secondary 'Attack' skills; this was changed to be exclusive for kid dragons on September 7th, 2019.
• 'Tickles' skill previously applied -[Mischief skill level * 0.3] Bonus to target, and had the tooltip: Lower enemy BtH, Dmg, and All Res!; the Bonus to Hit component was removed on  March 7th, 2020.
• 'Elemental Supernova' and 'Outrage' skills were bug fixed on  January 1st, 2021.
• The following changes were implemented on  June 23rd, 2023:
• Tickles' skill increased its effectiveness from applying +[Mischief skill level * 0.05] Health Resist to target'.
'Magic', 'Fighting', and 'Outrage' skills were modified.
• The following changes were implemented on  April 19th, 2024:
• Tier 1 skills were renamed to their proper names.
• 'Skip' and 'Primal' skills were moved.
• Tooltips for Toddler and Kid Dragons were updated.

attacks.requirements: Completion of  Hawk in the Sky to unlock
attacks.effect: Toggles Amadeus' attacks between Darkness damage and weakness seeking damage. (Pop-ups: Amadeus: 'I am not ruled by Darkness!' / Amadeus: 'Back to the shadows...')

attacks.name: Hold Nothing Back
attacks.description: Skills empowered for 3 turns, but cost % HP.
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 160% damage to all foes, with +30 Bonus; in the next three turns, Amadeus is empowered and certain skills gain additional effects, but at the cost of 5% of his maximum HP. (Pop-ups: Amadeus: 'You will not stand in my way.' / Amadeus: 'This pain... is nothing...')

attacks.name: Embrace the Darkness
attacks.effect:
5 hits of 50% damage, amounting to 250% damage.
  • If Amadeus is empowered, attack will instead perform 17 hits of 50% damage, amounting to 850% damage.

attacks.name: Heartcleaver
attacks.effect: 3 hits of 120% damage, amounting to 360% damage, with +200 Crit; if Amadeus is empowered, attack gains an additional +20% damage.

attacks.name: Rush
attacks.effect: 3 hits of 150% damage, amounting to 450% damage; if Amadeus is empowered, attack gains an additional +30% damage.

attacks.name: Pierce
attacks.effect: 1 hit of 150% damage; if Amadeus is empowered, attack gains an additional +50% damage.

attacks.name: Attack
attacks.effect:
1 hit of 120% damage, with +60 Bonus; recovers 5% of Amadeus' maximum HP.
  • If Amadeus is empowered, the heal effect will not be applied and attack gains an additional +30% damage.

notes:
• Amadeus has a series of unconventional stats in the quests  Hawk in the Sky,  Crash and Burn,  The Flame Within,  At Fissure's Edge,  The Final Steps, and  Convergence (Part 1): 
  • Amadeus gains -10 Immobility,  -60 Health, +60 All Resists. 
  • Amadeus' base damage is increased by 50%.
• Lost Blade and Skip skills were added with the release of  Crash and Burn.

notes:
Though the description says that this guest's weapon element is Silver, this guest copies the element, damage type and base damage as the player, enemy or pet which attacked previously before this guest's turn. If the player, enemy or pet which attacked before did not use an attacking move or the attack failed to land, then this guest's attacks will be blocked, dodged, Parried or will miss on that turn. This guest also copies any buff, critical hit or boost which affect the previous attacker's attack.
All skill cooldowns for this guest are carried on to the next battle as well.
